Module com.example._0tazo
Package com.example._0tazo.model

Class DeckTest

java.lang.Object
com.example._0tazo.model.DeckTest
@DisplayName("Deck") class DeckTest extends Object
Unit tests for Deck.

Covers initial deck size, dealing, discarding, recycling behavior (last card preservation), and the empty-deck error condition.

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      @BeforeEach void setUp()

    • testInitialSize

      @Test @DisplayName("New deck contains 104 cards") void testInitialSize()

    • testDiscardPileStartsEmpty

      @Test @DisplayName("Discard pile starts empty") void testDiscardPileStartsEmpty()

    • testPeekDiscardEmptyReturnsNull

      @Test @DisplayName("peekDiscard returns null when discard pile is empty") void testPeekDiscardEmptyReturnsNull()

    • testDealReducesDeckSize

      @Test @DisplayName("dealCard() reduces main deck size by 1") void testDealReducesDeckSize()

    • testDealCardFaceUpByDefault

      @Test @DisplayName("dealCard() returns card face up by default") void testDealCardFaceUpByDefault()

    • testDealCardFaceDown

      @Test @DisplayName("dealCard(false) returns card face down") void testDealCardFaceDown()

    • testDealCardFaceUp

      @Test @DisplayName("dealCard(true) returns card face up") void testDealCardFaceUp()

    • testDealAllCards

      @Test @DisplayName("Dealing all 104 cards empties the main deck") void testDealAllCards()

    • testDiscardIncreasesSize

      @Test @DisplayName("discard() increases discard pile size by 1") void testDiscardIncreasesSize()

    • testDiscardSetsFaceUp

      @Test @DisplayName("discard() sets card face up") void testDiscardSetsFaceUp()

    • testPeekDiscardReturnsTopCard

      @Test @DisplayName("peekDiscard returns last discarded card") void testPeekDiscardReturnsTopCard()

    • testRecyclePreservesLastCard

      @Test @DisplayName("Recycling preserves the last played card on the discard pile") void testRecyclePreservesLastCard()

    • testRecycleRefillsMainDeck

      @Test @DisplayName("Recycling refills the main deck from the discard pile") void testRecycleRefillsMainDeck()

    • testRecycledCardsAreFaceDown

      @Test @DisplayName("Recycled cards are face down in the main deck") void testRecycledCardsAreFaceDown()

    • testDealFromEmptyDeckThrows

      @Test @DisplayName("dealCard() throws IllegalStateException when both piles are empty") void testDealFromEmptyDeckThrows()

    • testTotalCardCountConsistency

      @Test @DisplayName("Total cards across both piles equals 104 after several operations") void testTotalCardCountConsistency()
